ch0012_90_corni/0101_0701_01_10:
Just as I thought, here comes
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0012_90_corni/0101_0701_02_10:
I knew you’d be here, since Lucario was all
fidgety. No doubt he sensed your aura!
ch0012_90_corni/7101_0701_01_10:
Now that I’ve awakened my arc suit, I feel
like I’ve evolved!
ch0012_90_corni/7101_0701_02_10: I bet my rolling axe-kick has leveled up, too!
ch0012_90_corni/7101_0701_03_10:
I plan to practice some tricks in my arc suit
soon. You should come watch!
ch0012_90_corni/7102_0701_01_10:
Up till now, I’ve trained hard, making sure
I never forget to set my heights as high as
the sky.
ch0012_90_corni/7102_0701_02_10:
I suppose awakening my arc suit is a pretty
big milestone, huh?
ch0012_90_corni/7102_0701_03_10: Oh! That doesn’t mean I’ll stop, of course!
ch0012_90_corni/7102_0701_04_10: Lucario and I will keep on climbing!
ch0012_90_corni/7103_0701_01_10:
People tend to fight over power only few
can hold.
ch0012_90_corni/7103_0701_02_10:
But everyone has the chance to get an
arc suit!
ch0012_90_corni/7103_0701_03_10:
Maybe I should help others get an arc suit,
too!
ch0012_90_corni/7104_0701_01_10:
Lucario’s part of quite a few Pasio
sync pairs, huh?
ch0012_90_corni/7104_0701_02_10:
Every one of those Trainers has a strong
bond with their Lucario. But I can’t let them
surpass mine!
ch0012_90_corni/7104_0701_03_10:
We’ve gotta be the best Lucario sync pair
there is!
ch0012_90_corni/7105_0701_01_10:
I plan to work out with Lucario to make us
an even more perfect pair!
ch0012_90_corni/7105_0701_03_10:
Exercising and sweating till you’re dead
tired... It feels great! Plus, it might deepen
your bonds!
ch0012_90_corni/1701_0701_01_10: Here you go! It’s a present!
ch0012_90_corni/1701_0702_01_10:
And with this, our bond has deepened...or
something like that!
ch0012_90_corni/2501_0701_01_10:
Arc suits kind of feel like Mega Evolution...
but for people!
ch0012_90_corni/2501_0701_02_10:
When I’m in mine and Lucario’s
Mega Evolved...
ch0012_90_corni/2501_0701_03_10:
It feels like we match! It makes me
so happy!
ch0012_90_corni/2501_0702_01_10:
If I had a catchphrase for when I use my
arc suit, it’d be something like...
ch0012_90_corni/2501_0702_03_10:
Wait, no. It’s not Mega Evolution, so...
“Korrina! Arc suit!” ...Right?
ch0012_90_corni/2511_0701_01_10: I couldn’t have gotten this strong alone.
ch0012_90_corni/2511_0701_02_10:
The kindness and courage you and Lucario
have given me—they’re the reason my
world is full of smiles!
ch0012_90_corni/2511_0701_03_10:
My bonds with you both are important
to me.
ch0012_90_corni/2511_0702_01_10:
Strength has no limits—and neither
do bonds!
ch0012_90_corni/2511_0702_02_10:
I look forward to seeing how deep our
bond grows!
ch0012_90_corni/3001_0701_01_10:
You gotta have a hearty breakfast if you
want to get through the day! Want to
eat together?
ch0012_90_corni/3003_0701_01_10:
Midday might be the best time to battle
each other!
ch0012_90_corni/3005_0701_01_10:
The more time I spend with others,
the deeper our bonds get. That goes
for my Pokémon AND you!
